issue: Task context returns 9 rules because the keyword filter finds no token hit, so it falls back to all medium/high-confidence rules. "create new lib" should map narrowly to nx21-monorepo-patterns (+ typescript baseline at most).
expected: Task context should narrow to nx21-monorepo-patterns + typescript6-patterns + package-manager rule; everything else should drop.
rootCauseHypothesis: In src/commands/context.ts pickTaskRelevantRules, when zero rules match task tokens it returns the entire medium/high-confidence set. There is no task-to-rule routing table to short-circuit this fallback for ecosystem-specific tasks like "create new lib".
